entries.title: Real-time Stream Polling
entries.description: Dashboard now auto-refreshes claimable amounts every 30 seconds.

entries.title: Bulk Stream Actions
entries.description: Select multiple streams and cancel, top-up, or export them in one click.

entries.title: Stream Bookmarks
entries.description: Bookmark your most important streams and pin them to the top of the list.

entries.title: Keyboard Shortcuts
entries.description: Navigate the dashboard faster with keyboard shortcuts. Press ? to view them.

entries.title: Vesting Chart
entries.description: Stream detail pages now include a visual vesting curve chart.
